prompt: American retro comic book pop-art style, 1:1 square headshot extreme close-up. A plain white cartoon duck with a neutral expression, round head, small orange beak, and simple black dot eyes looking slightly sideways. Clean white feathers with subtle shading. Circular white frame element around its head. Bold black ink outlines, comic-style hatching shadows. High contrast soft purple and lilac lighting from below. Background of lavender and white radial speed lines, clean composition, no body.
prompt_zh: 美式复古漫画波普风格，1：1正方形头像极近特写。一只普通的白色卡通鸭，表情中性，圆头，小橙嘴，简单的黑色圆点眼睛微微侧视。简洁白色羽毛带微妙阴影。头部周围有白色圆形边框元素。粗黑墨水勾边，漫画风格排线阴影。高对比度柔和紫与丁香光从下方打亮。背景为薰衣草与白色放射线速度线，干净构图，无身体。

prompt: American retro comic book pop-art style, 1:1 square headshot extreme close-up. A white cartoon duck with one eyebrow slightly raised and a subtle suspicious glance, orange beak closed in a straight line. Simple white plumage with bold black outlines. Purple circular badge frame around its head. Bold outlines, dramatic ink-wash hatching. High contrast violet and cream lighting. Background of royal purple and white sunburst speed lines with decorative ring, no body.

prompt: American retro comic book pop-art style, 1:1 square headshot extreme close-up. A ghostly cartoon duck with a mischievous grin, its body partially transparent with dashed black outlines showing a see-through effect. One eye winked shut, the other glowing with icy blue energy. Wisps of vapor trail from its beak. Bold black ink outlines on visible parts, comic-style hatching. High contrast cyan and silver lighting. Background of dark navy and electric blue radial speed lines with transparent echo copies, no body.
prompt_zh: 美式复古漫画波普风格，1：1正方形头像极近特写。一只幽灵般的卡通鸭带着调皮坏笑，身体部分透明，黑色虚线轮廓呈现透视效果。一只眼眨着，另一只眼发出冰蓝色能量光。鸭嘴冒出丝丝蒸气。可见部分有粗黑墨水勾边，漫画风格排线阴影。高对比度青色与银色光。背景为深海军蓝与电蓝放射线速度线，透明重影副本，无身体。

prompt: American retro comic book pop-art style, 1:1 square headshot extreme close-up. A ghostly cartoon duck fading into transparency, its outline rendered in dashed black lines, only its glowing white eyes and sly smirk remain solid against a dark background. Faint blue digital scan lines overlay its form. Bold outlines on remaining features, retro comic texture. High contrast white and cyan neon glow. Background of charcoal black and teal concentric rings with glitch distortion effects, no body.
prompt_zh: 美式复古漫画波普风格，1：1正方形头像极近特写。一只幽灵般的卡通鸭逐渐变得透明，轮廓以黑色虚线渲染，暗背景下仅发光的白色眼睛和狡黠坏笑保持实体。淡蓝色数字扫描线覆盖其形态。可见特征有粗黑轮廓，复古漫画纹理。高对比度白色与青色霓虹光。背景为炭黑与青色同心圆环，故障失真效果，无身体。

prompt: American retro comic book pop-art style, 1:1 square headshot extreme close-up. A partially invisible cartoon duck, only its head and one hand emerging from a shimmering cloaking field with dashed outlines. The visible parts show sharp black outlines while the rest dissolves into light particles. One eye glows bright white. Bold outlines, clean comic shading. High contrast silver and electric violet glow. Background of deep purple and silver particle streams with diamond-shaped energy fragments, no body.
prompt_zh: 美式复古漫画波普风格，1：1正方形头像极近特写。一只部分隐形的卡通鸭，仅头部和一只手从闪烁的隐身力场中显现，虚线轮廓。可见部分有锐利的黑色轮廓，其余部分溶解成光粒子。一只眼发出明亮白光。粗黑轮廓，干净漫画阴影。高对比度银色与电紫光。背景为深紫与银色粒子流，菱形能量碎片，无身体。

prompt: American retro comic book pop-art style, 1:1 square headshot extreme close-up. A sneaky cartoon duck wrapped in an invisibility cloak with dashed outline effect, only its beak and glowing green eyes peeking out from the shimmering fabric. The cloak ripples with energy waves. Bold black ink outlines, comic halftone texture. High contrast emerald green and silver lighting. Background of dark forest green and chrome radial speed lines with swirling mist particles, no body.
prompt_zh: 美式复古漫画波普风格，1：1正方形头像极近特写。一只鬼祟的卡通鸭裹在隐身斗篷中，虚线轮廓效果，仅鸭嘴和发光的绿眼从闪烁的织物中窥视。斗篷泛起能量波纹。粗黑墨水勾边，漫画半调纹理。高对比度翡翠绿与银色光。背景为深森林绿与铬色放射线速度线，旋转雾气粒子，无身体。

prompt: American retro comic book pop-art style, 1:1 square headshot extreme close-up. A mischievous cartoon duck phasing out of visibility with dashed outlines, half its face solid with bold outlines, the other half dissolving into blue digital pixels and light beams. One visible eye twinkles with a devious gleam. Bold outlines, clean comic shading. High contrast ice blue and white neon glow. prompt: American retro comic book pop-art style, 1:1 square headshot extreme close-up. An almost fully invisible cartoon duck with dashed outline, only a faint dotted outline and two bright white glowing eyes remain visible. Its beak shape barely perceptible. Light refracts around its form creating rainbow prism edges. Bold white outlines, retro comic print texture. High contrast pure white and prismatic glow. Background of solid black and white concentric speed rings with light refraction rainbows, extremely clean, no body.
prompt_zh: 美式复古漫画波普风格，1：1正方形头像极近特写。一只几乎完全隐形的卡通鸭，虚线轮廓，仅剩淡淡虚线轮廓和两个明亮的白色发光眼可见。鸭嘴形状几乎不可感知。光线在其形态周围折射形成彩虹棱镜边缘。粗黑白色轮廓，复古漫画印刷纹理。高对比度纯白与棱镜光。背景为纯黑与白色同心圆速度环线，光线折射彩虹，极干净，无身体。
